name: Suspicious Anonymous Tunnel Creation via Microsoft Dev Tunnel
description: Detects the execution of the devtunnel host command with the --allow-anonymous flag, which establishes a network tunnel without requiring authentication. This behavior may be exploited by threat actors to enable unauthorized remote access, facilitate command and control (C2) communication, or support data exfiltration activities.

filterSets.name: Suspicious Anonymous Tunnel Creation via Microsoft Dev Tunnel

author: Ahmed Kamal & Yusuf Madkour
